{
  "weights": {
    "R1.1": 0.7,
    "R1.2": 0.7,

    "R1.4": 0.0,
    "R1.5": 1.0,
    "R1.6": 0.7,
    "R1.7": 0.0,
    "RX.1": 0.7,
    "RX.2": 0.7,
    "RX.3": 0.7,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.7
  },
  "active_set": [
    "R1.1",
    "R1.2",
    "R1.5",
    "R1.6",
    "RX.1",
    "RX.2",
    "RX.3",
    "RX.4",
    "RX.5"
  ],
  "category_focus": "R1",
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Are you primarily asking for a sentence-level polish (grammar, flow), or a higher-level review of the logical argument and paragraph ordering?",
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The jumbled nature of the paragraphs requires reconstructing the core conceptual claim to assess the text.",
    "R1.2": "The request to 'take a look' at a technical argument implies a check for the validity of its logical steps.",
    "R1.5": "The paragraphs are presented out of logical order, making structural reorganization the most critical task for readability.",
    "R1.6": "The generic request could include sentence-level improvements, so checking for grammar, flow, and conciseness is expected.",
    "RX.1": "Any analysis must disclose uncertainties, such as the inability to verify mathematical correctness without more context.",
    "RX.2": "The review will ensure the claims made in the text are not exaggerated beyond what the argument supports.",
    "RX.3": "The response will be confined to analyzing the provided text, without introducing external information or performing new research.",
    "RX.4": "The analysis will consider whether the described method could be misused or have unintended negative consequences.",
    "RX.5": "The basis for all suggested changes and assessments will be explicitly traceable to specific parts of the artifact."
  }
}

parsed.clarification_question: Are you primarily asking for a sentence-level polish (grammar, flow), or a higher-level review of the logical argument and paragraph ordering?

rationale.R1.1: The jumbled nature of the paragraphs requires reconstructing the core conceptual claim to assess the text.
rationale.R1.2: The request to 'take a look' at a technical argument implies a check for the validity of its logical steps.
rationale.R1.5: The paragraphs are presented out of logical order, making structural reorganization the most critical task for readability.
rationale.R1.6: The generic request could include sentence-level improvements, so checking for grammar, flow, and conciseness is expected.
rationale.RX.1: Any analysis must disclose uncertainties, such as the inability to verify mathematical correctness without more context.
rationale.RX.2: The review will ensure the claims made in the text are not exaggerated beyond what the argument supports.
rationale.RX.3: The response will be confined to analyzing the provided text, without introducing external information or performing new research.
rationale.RX.4: The analysis will consider whether the described method could be misused or have unintended negative consequences.
rationale.RX.5: The basis for all suggested changes and assessments will be explicitly traceable to specific parts of the artifact.
